TENDER NOTICE

Project Title: Software Development B6
Estimated Value: GBP 208,255.00
Submission Deadline: 2025-11-07T18:35:06Z

Contracting Authority:
Technology Services
Contact: tech.contracts@services.org

Project Description:
This is a simple technology project requiring professional expertise and proven experience.

Evaluation Criteria:
1. Sustainability (19%)
2. Project Timeline (24%)
3. Technical Capability (57%)

Additional Requirements:
- 24/7 technical support availability
- Agile development methodology
- Data privacy compliance required

Submission Instructions:
All proposals must be submitted through the designated procurement portal.
Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.
Questions regarding this tender should be directed to the contact person above.

This tender is subject to all applicable laws and regulations.
The contracting authority reserves the right to cancel or modify this tender at any time.
